name: CampaignOps: Daily Summary
description: Pull campaign metrics → calculate conversion → identify stuck leads → generate AI summary → send to owner

parameters.query: SELECT status, tier, COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE campaign_id = '{{ $env.CAMPAIGN_ID }}' GROUP BY status, tier
SELECT event_type, COUNT(*) FROM outreach_events WHERE sent_at::date = CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY event_type
SELECT reply_type, COUNT(*) FROM reply_events WHERE created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY reply_type
SELECT status, COUNT(*) FROM sla_events WHERE status IN ('due_soon','overdue','escalated') GROUP BY status

parameters.systemPrompt: You are a campaign analyst. Given metrics, write a concise daily summary: key numbers, best segment, weakest message, SLA risks, one actionable recommendation. Direct and data-driven.
